common.readMore: Unroll more of the scroll, ye curious seadog!

auth.title: AVAST! WHO GOES THERE?!
auth.signInPrompt: Sign in with Discord or be fed to the kraken, ye scurvy dog!
auth.loggedOut: Ye've abandoned ship, ye cowardly sea cucumber!
auth.mustBeLoggedIn: Ye must be part of the crew to do that, ye bilge-drinkin' barnacle!
auth.unknownError: DAVY JONES HIMSELF STOLE OUR AUTHENTICATION! CURSE HIS TENTACLED FACE!

401.title: 401 - OI! WHO BE YE?!
401.message: Ye ain't got permission to be snoopin' around here, ye sneaky bilge rat! Show us yer papers or WALK THE PLANK!

403.title: 403 - KEEP OUT, SCALLYWAG!!!
403.message: This part of the ship be OFF LIMITS to the likes of ye! The cap'n will have yer head mounted on the bow!

404.title: 404 - LOST IN THE BERMUDA TRIANGLE!!!
404.message: This page has been SWALLOWED BY THE DEPTHS! Either the kraken got it, or ye took a wrong turn at Tortuga after too much rum!

500.title: 500 - THE SHIP BE ON FIRE!!!
500.message: ABANDON ALL HOPE! Our vessel be takin' on water faster than a sieve in a hurricane! The crew be panickin'!

generic.title: SHIVER ME TIMBERS AND BLOW ME DOWN!
generic.message: Somethin' went CATASTROPHICALLY wrong in the engine room! The parrot be investigatin' but he's not optimistic!

premiumRequired.title: CAP'N'S QUARTERS ONLY, YE PEASANT!
premiumRequired.message: ARRR! This treasure be locked behind the captain's golden door! Pay yer dues or forever remain a lowly DECK SWABBER!

accessDenied.title: ACCESS DENIED, LANDLUBBER!
accessDenied.message: Ye don't have the rank to peek at this crew's treasure maps! Get yer own ship, ye mooching mollusk!

guildNotFound.title: SHIP LOST TO DAVY JONES!
guildNotFound.message: We've searched ALL SEVEN SEAS but this vessel be nowhere in sight! Perhaps it was claimed by the depths themselves!

summaryNotFound.title: THE LOG BE DEVOURED!
summaryNotFound.message: This ship's log entry has been EATEN BY SEA MONSTERS or lost to the inky abyss! The ink has run dry and the pages be soggy!

giveawayNotFound.title: THE TREASURE HUNT BE LOST TO THE DEPTHS!
giveawayNotFound.message: This treasure hunt has VANISHED like a ghost ship in the fog! Either it be deleted or ye ain't got the clearance, ye snooping barnacle!

errors.unexpected: BLIMEY! We hit an iceberg we didn't see comin'! WHO WAS ON LOOKOUT?!
errors.failedToLoad: Failed to haul {{item}} aboard: {{error}} - SOMEONE'S GETTIN' KEELHAULED!

hero.heading: HOIST THE COLORS WITH
hero.body: Tired of managin' treasure hunts like some landlubbin' FOOL?! Join MILLIONS of Discord crews and let this magnificent bot do the heavy liftin' while ye drink RUM!

features.title: Built different, like a LEGENDARY pirate vessel!
features.description: This here bot be crafted by the finest shipwrights in ALL THE SEVEN SEAS! She handles giveaways smoother than rum slides down yer throat after a successful raid!

effortless.title: FASTER THAN A CANNONBALL!
effortless.description: Create treasure hunts quicker than ye can say 'SHIVER ME TIMBERS!' No complicated nonsense - even a cabin boy could do it!

seamless.title: RIGHT THERE IN DISCORD!
seamless.description: No need to leave yer ship! The bot works right where ye already be drinkin', gamblin', and causin' mischief!

secure.title: LOCKED TIGHTER THAN DAVY JONES' LOCKER!
secure.description: Yer secrets be SAFER than a dragon's hoard! We don't sell yer maps to rival pirates, and we don't hoard more than we need!

openSource.title: OPEN SOURCE, LIKE A GOOD TAVERN!
openSource.description: Peek under the hood anytime ye want! The code be open for all to see, modify, and make even MORE GLORIOUS!

free.title: FREE AS THE WIND IN YER SAILS!
free.description: The core features cost ye NOTHIN'! Cap'n features exist for the fancy folk, but ye can sail just fine without 'em!

multilingual.title: SPEAKS MORE TONGUES THAN A CURSED PARROT!
multilingual.description: Whether ye speak the Queen's English, Pirate, or somethin' else entirely - this bot UNDERSTANDS!

testimonials.title: STILL NOT CONVINCED, YE SKEPTICAL SEADOG?!
testimonials.description: Don't take our word for it! Here be testimonies from REAL pirates who've sailed these glorious waters!

closing.heading: WHAT IN DAVY JONES' NAME ARE YE WAITIN' FOR?!
closing.body: The tide waits for NO ONE! Set sail NOW and let GiveawayBot handle the boring stuff while ye focus on bein' a LEGENDARY CAPTAIN!

meta.title: Cap'n's Quarters | GiveawayBot
meta.description: Upgrade to CAP'N STATUS and unlock the REAL treasure, ye ambitious scallywag!

hero.heading: THE LEGENDARY CAP'N'S QUARTERS!
hero.body: Rise above the common deck swabbers! Unlock EXCLUSIVE features that'll make Blackbeard himself GREEN WITH ENVY!

features.title: Make yer treasure hunts ABSOLUTELY LEGENDARY!
features.description: Cap'n status comes with perks that'll make even the Flying Dutchman jealous!

longerGiveaways.title: LONGER VOYAGES!
longerGiveaways.description: Run treasure hunts that last longer than a journey to the edges of the map!

moreGiveaways.title: MORE TREASURE HUNTS!!!
moreGiveaways.description: Why settle for a few when ye can have a WHOLE ARMADA of giveaways?!

moreCustomization.title: FANCIER SAILS!
moreCustomization.description: Customize yer giveaways with colors, fancy footers, and SHINY THINGS!

moreWinners.title: MORE LUCKY SCALLYWAGS!
moreWinners.description: Pick MORE winners! Share the booty with MORE of yer crew! GENEROSITY BE A VIRTUE!

andMore.title: AND EVEN MORE BOOTY!
andMore.description: Get EARLY ACCESS to new features before the common sailors even DREAM they exist!

whatIsPremium.question: What in the seven seas is Cap'n status?!
whatIsPremium.answer: It be a GLORIOUS subscription that transforms ye from a lowly deck swabber into a PROPER LEGENDARY CAPTAIN! More giveaways, longer voyages, fancier EVERYTHING! YE'LL BE THE TERROR OF ALL THE SEAS!

whatHappensWhenCancel.question: What if I abandon ship like a coward?
whatHappensWhenCancel.answer: If ye cancel, ye keep yer cap'n privileges until yer current billing cycle ends. Then ye return to deck swabber status. No hard feelings, but ye'll be MISSIN' THE GOOD LIFE!

howManyServers.question: How many ships does me subscription cover?
howManyServers.answer: One subscription = ONE ship! If ye want to be cap'n of multiple vessels, ye'll need to pay for each one. Being a FLEET ADMIRAL ain't cheap, but it be WORTH IT!

cta.title: THE MOMENT OF TRUTH BE NOW!!!
cta.body: Every moment ye wait, another pirate be claimin' YOUR treasure! SUBSCRIBE NOW or forever live with the regret of a thousand sunken ships!

meta.title: Yer Treasure Hunts | GiveawayBot
meta.description: Manage all yer GLORIOUS plunderin' operations!

giveaways.title: YER MAGNIFICENT TREASURE HUNTS!
giveaways.description: Here be all the treasure hunts ye can manage. Ye need the 'Manage Events' permission to boss people around like a proper cap'n!
giveaways.hostedDescription: These be the treasure hunts ye're runnin' across ALL yer ships!
giveaways.noGiveaways: NO TREASURE HUNTS?! WHAT KIND OF PIRATE ARE YE?! Start one with `/start` before the crew MUTINIES from boredom!
giveaways.noGiveawaysInServer: This ship has NO treasure hunts! The crew be gettin' restless! START ONE IMMEDIATELY!
giveaways.noMatchingGiveaways: NO TREASURE HUNTS MATCH YER SEARCH, YE PICKY LANDLUBBER! Try adjustin' yer filters!
giveaways.guildDataUnavailable: The ship's records be LOST TO THE DEPTHS!
giveaways.giveawayDataUnavailable: The treasure hunt records be LOST TO DAVY JONES!
giveaways.ended: The hunt concluded {{time}} - THE BOOTY HAS BEEN CLAIMED!

details.title: Treasure Hunt Details
details.failedToLoadParticipants: COULDN'T LOAD THE CREW MANIFEST! Try again, ye impatient seadog!

emptyState.title: NO TREASURE HUNTS YET, YE LAZY BARNACLE!
emptyState.description: Start yer first treasure hunt in Discord using the /start command. It be faster than swabbin' the deck!

edit.title: MODIFY THE TREASURE HUNT!
edit.prizePlaceholder: What treasure be ye givin' away?
edit.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional tale about this glorious hunt...

validation.prizeRequired: YE NEED TREASURE TO GIVE AWAY, YE FOOL!
validation.prizeTooLong: That treasure name be longer than a sea serpent! Keep it under 100 letters!
validation.winnersMin: At least ONE scallywag must win, ye greedy captain!
validation.winnersMax: 50 winners be the limit! We ain't made of gold!
validation.descriptionTooLong: Blimey! That tale be too long! Keep it under 1000 letters!

success.title: TREASURE HUNT MODIFIED!
success.message: Yer changes be saved and the Discord message be updated, ARRR!

error.title: MODIFICATION FAILED!
error.message: Couldn't update the treasure hunt. The kraken must be interferin'!

stop.title: END THE HUNT EARLY!
stop.warning: AVAST! This cannot be undone, ye scurvy dog!
stop.confirmMessage: Be ye CERTAIN ye want to end the hunt for "{{prize}}" early?
stop.explanation: The hunt ends NOW! Winners be drawn from current crew members and announced in Discord immediately!

success.title: HUNT ENDED!
success.message: The treasure hunt be over and winners have been chosen!

error.title: COULDN'T END THE HUNT!
error.message: Somethin' went wrong! The kraken must be holdin' things up!

reroll.title: PICK NEW WINNERS!
reroll.note: HEAR YE! This be just a quick draw - the original ship's log stays untouched! Copy these results and announce 'em yerself!
reroll.countDescription: How many fresh scallywags to pick from the remainin' crew
reroll.freeLimitMessage: Free crews can reroll 1 scallywag at a time. Upgrade to reroll a whole bunch of 'em!
reroll.copyHint: Copy these names and shout 'em out in Discord!
reroll.noEligibleParticipants: No more crew members to pick from! The barrel be empty!

success.title: NEW WINNERS DRAWN!
success.message: {{count}} new lucky scallywag(s) picked! Now go announce 'em, ye lazy captain!

error.title: DRAW FAILED!
error.message: Couldn't pick new winners. The dice be cursed!

meta.title: Ship's Log | GiveawayBot
meta.description: Review the sacred records of past plunderin' victories!

summaries.title: THE SACRED SHIP'S LOG!
summaries.description: Upload a treasure hunt log to see who won the GLORIOUS BOOTY! These scrolls be generated when a hunt reaches its epic conclusion!
summaries.invalidFileType: THAT AIN'T A PROPER SCROLL, YE FOOL! Upload a JSON file or be KEELHAULED!
summaries.invalidSummaryFile: This scroll be CURSED: {{error}} - THROW IT OVERBOARD!
summaries.expiresIn: This scroll crumbles to dust {{time}} - READ IT WHILE YE CAN!
summaries.dropzoneText: THROW YER SCROLL HERE or click to dig it up from the depths!
summaries.dropzoneHelp: Scrolls must be JSON format and smaller than 5MB (we ain't got room for epic novels!)
summaries.summaryDataUnavailable: The log be water-damaged beyond recognition! CURSE THIS HUMIDITY!

winners.title: THE GLORIOUS WINNERS!!!
winners.searchPlaceholder: Hunt for a specific lucky scallywag...

participants.title: ALL THE HOPEFUL SOULS WHO TRIED

meta.title: Ancient Pirate Scrolls | GiveawayBot
meta.description: All the forbidden knowledge ye need to become a MASTER of treasure hunts!

wiki.title: THE ANCIENT FORBIDDEN SCROLLS!
wiki.subtitle: Everything ye need to know about runnin' the most LEGENDARY treasure hunts on ALL the seven seas!

notFound.title: SCROLL NOT FOUND, MATEY!
notFound.message: This ancient scroll doesn't exist or the scribe hasn't written it yet! BLIMEY!

gettingStarted.title: LEARN THE ROPES, LANDLUBBER!
gettingStarted.description: Fresh off the docks? Start here before ye hurt yerself or embarrass the crew!

userGuides.title: THE SAILOR'S HANDBOOK!
userGuides.description: Step-by-step guides for all the fancy features! Even a drunk sailor could follow these!

reference.title: THE SACRED PIRATE CODE!
reference.description: Every command and option, documented in EXCRUCIATING detail for yer pleasure!

advanced.title: DARK ARTS OF THE DEEP!
advanced.description: For experienced pirates who want to push the BOUNDARIES OF POSSIBILITY!

developer.title: SHIPWRIGHT'S FORBIDDEN SECRETS!
developer.description: Technical mumbo-jumbo for the code-slingin' wizards among us!

wiki.noPagesYet: This section be emptier than a rum barrel after a LEGENDARY party!
wiki.tableOfContents: What secrets lie within this scroll
wiki.suggestEdits: Found an error?! TELL US IMMEDIATELY!

meta.title: Boring Maritime Law | GiveawayBot
meta.description: The tedious but necessary legal scrolls that even pirates must follow

legal.title: THE BORING LEGAL NONSENSE (But ye gotta read it!)

mdx.translationNotAvailable: ARRR! This scroll hasn't been translated to proper Pirate yet! Showin' the boring landlubber version!

feedback.button: SEND A MESSAGE IN A BOTTLE!
feedback.description: Found a leak in the hull?! Got a BRILLIANT idea?! TELL US EVERYTHING!
feedback.nameLabel: What do they call ye, sailor?
feedback.feedbackPlaceholder: SPEAK YER MIND, YE SALTY SEA DOG! Hold nothing back!
feedback.submitButton: THROW IT INTO THE RAGING SEA!

validation.nameRequired: WE NEED YER NAME, YE ANONYMOUS COWARD! HOW ELSE WILL WE KNOW WHO TO THANK?!
validation.emailInvalid: That ain't how parrot addresses work, ye technologically challenged barnacle!
validation.feedbackRequired: YE FORGOT TO WRITE ANYTHING, YE EMPTY-HEADED SEA SPONGE!

success.title: MESSAGE SUCCESSFULLY LAUNCHED!
success.message: Yer bottle be floatin' towards us on the currents! We'll read it when it washes ashore on our island!

enableReporting.title: ENABLE ERROR REPORTING FIRST, YE SCALLYWAG!
enableReporting.message: Ye need to enable error reporting in yer secrecy settings before sendin' messages! It's the rules!

feedback.replayNote: HEADS UP, MATEY! Since ye enabled session replay, yer feedback comes with a MAGICAL RECORDING of what happened! Helps us see the problem with our own four eyes!

privacy.title: SECRECY SETTINGS!
privacy.description: We use Sentry as our lookout to catch problems before they SINK THE SHIP! Customize what ye share below!
privacy.serverSideNote: Server errors ALWAYS get reported (we need to know when the ship's takin' on water!). These settings only affect what YER browser tells us!

errorReporting.label: Error Reporting
errorReporting.description: Let us know when things go CATASTROPHICALLY WRONG! No personal treasure be collected!

performanceTracing.label: Speed Tracking
performanceTracing.description: Help us make the ship go FASTER! We track page loads and navigation to optimize our sails!

sessionReplay.label: Session Recording
sessionReplay.description: Record what happened so we can see bugs with our OWN EYES! All personal stuff be masked, we promise on our pirate honor!

updated.title: SECRECY SETTINGS UPDATED!
updated.message: Yer preferences be safely stashed! Refresh the page to make it so, cap'n!

settings.label: Ship Settings
settings.noLanguagesFound: No tongues found in these waters! HOW STRANGE!

footer.copyright: This vessel be the property of Dougley © {{year}}, YE BEST BELIEVE IT!

meta.title: GiveawayBot - THE GREATEST TREASURE HUNT BOT ON ALL SEVEN SEAS!
meta.description: YARRR! Automate yer Discord treasure hunts with the most LEGENDARY bot ever constructed by mortal hands! Free, powerful, and PIRATE APPROVED!

copied.title: PLUNDERED!
copied.message: The treasure map coordinates be on yer clipboard!

downloadError.title: THE KRAKEN ATTACKED!
downloadError.message: Couldn't plunder the summary! Try again, ye unlucky seadog!

added.title: WELCOME ABOARD, MATEY!
added.description: GiveawayBot has joined yer crew and be ready to sail! Start yer first treasure hunt in mere seconds!

nextSteps.title: SET SAIL IMMEDIATELY!
nextSteps.step1: Bark this order in any channel:
nextSteps.step2: Declare the treasure, how long the hunt lasts, and count o' plunderers!
nextSteps.step3: Watch the scurvy dogs fight to join the hunt! YARRR!
